CLAIRE CAPITAL MANAGEMENT, INC., JIGAR PATEL'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT'S CROSS-COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER TO THE FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. STANDING IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEMURRER TO CAUSES OF ACTION 3, 4, 6 AND 8 IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE INJURY THAT IS NOT INCIDENTAL TO INJURY TO LLC AND/OR TO ALLEGE DEMAND/FUTILITY OF DEMAND. ADDITIONALLY DEMURRER TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS ALLEGED TO ALLEGE WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY RELIANCE ON MISREPRESENTATIONS AND DAMAGES. DEMURER TO THE SEVENTH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO ALLEGE THIS CAUSE OF ACTION WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. Plaintiff'S And Cross Defendant Greenmd, Llc, Green Growth, Llc, Alchemical Earth Designs, Inc., St. Claire Capital Management, Inc., Jigar Patel'S Demurrer To Cross Complaint'S Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff'S And Cross Defendant Greenmd, Llc, Green Growth, Llc, Alchemical Earth Designs, Inc., St. Claire Capital Management, Inc., Jigar Patel'S Demurrer To Cross Complaint'S Cross-Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer to the first and second causes of action is overruled. Standing is sufficiently alleged. Demurrer to causes of action 3, 4, 6 and 8 is sustained with leave to amend to allege injury that is not incidental to injury to LLC and/or to allege demand/futility of demand. Additionally demurrer to the sixth cause of action is alleged to allege with requisite specificity reliance on misrepresentations and damages. Demurer to the seventh cause of action is sustained with leave to allege this cause of action with requisite specificity. Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
